name: FORWARD
doc: Move the turtle forward by N steps along its current heading.

name: BACK
doc: Move the turtle backward by N steps along its current heading.

name: RIGHT
doc: Rotate the turtle clockwise by N degrees.

name: LEFT
doc: Rotate the turtle counter-clockwise by N degrees.

name: PENUP
doc: Lift the pen. Subsequent moves do not draw.

name: PENDOWN
doc: Put the pen down. Subsequent moves draw.

name: HIDETURTLE
doc: Hide the turtle cursor. Drawing still works.

name: SHOWTURTLE
doc: Show the turtle cursor.

name: CLEARSCREEN
doc: Clear the drawing and return the turtle to the origin.

name: HOME
doc: Move the turtle to the origin without clearing.

name: SETXY
doc: Move the turtle to the given (x, y) coordinates.

name: SETHEADING
doc: Set the turtle's heading to N degrees (0 = north).

name: SETPENCOLOR
doc: Set the pen colour to the given colour number or name.

name: REPEAT
doc: Run the list body N times.

name: IF
doc: Run the list body if the condition is true.

name: IFELSE
doc: Run the first list body if the condition is true, otherwise the second.

name: MAKE
doc: Bind the given quoted name to a value.

name: LOCAL
doc: Declare a local variable in the enclosing procedure.

name: OUTPUT
doc: Return a value from the enclosing procedure.

name: STOP
doc: Stop the enclosing procedure without returning a value.

name: RANDOM
doc: Return a random non-negative integer less than N.
